summary_points: Ministry real GDP growth forecast is 1.4% in 2025 and 1.3% in 2026.
Nominal GDP growth is forecast at 3.8% in 2025 and 4.1% in 2026.
Employment growth is expected to moderate to 1.1% in 2025 and 0.7% in 2026.
Unemployment rate is forecast at 6.2% in 2025 and 6.1% in 2026.
Consumer price inflation is forecast at 2.1% in both 2025 and 2026.
Housing starts are forecast at 44,500 units in 2025 and 44,823 in 2026.
Key risks highlighted: global trade conflict, weak home sales, migration volatility, and commodity price swings.
